item.title: Sunflower - A lightweight desktop application framework that pairs GTK4 with a JavaScript engine
item.author: /u/Fabulous-Repair-8665
item.content:encoded: A lightweight desktop application framework that pairs with a engine. Write your UI in a declarative XML markup, style it with CSS, and bring it to life with JavaScript — all without the overhead of a browser engine.

item.title: Awful experience when add sub-command specified options use OptionParser
item.author: zw963
item.content:encoded: Following is the real usage in my project.I have to run twice.the first time run on line 36, only for get the correct sub-command in line 49the second time run on line 52, line 54-56, add logic for parse opts of sub-commandsMaybe this is the only expected approach? I feel like it could be simpler,any idea?

item.title: How to disable ```auto expanding(and select langange) in the forum post?
item.author: zw963
item.content:encoded: I don’t remember when crystal forum update to support this, I really hate it.What I expected is , I type the beginning/ending of code use ``` myself, can I disable this to rollback to old forum behavior?
